modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty inserting a picture in OneNote.

full_description_text: The user is attempting to insert a picture into OneNote. They are unsure of the correct procedure to accomplish this task. The issue arises during their efforts to enhance their notes with visual content. This situation necessitates clarification on the steps required for successful image insertion in the OneNote application.
short_description: Difficulty inserting a picture in OneNote.
description: The user is attempting to insert a picture into OneNote. They are unsure of the correct procedure to accomplish this task. The issue arises during their efforts to enhance their notes with visual content. This situation necessitates clarification on the steps required for successful image insertion in the OneNote application.
